title: lamium amplexicaule var. orientale
intro: Lamium amplexicaule var. orientale, also known as White Spotted Dead Nettle, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of wounds and infections. The health benefits of Lamium amplexicaule var. orientale include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
